description: rockport Abraim is the first-ever classic dress shoe engineered with an athletic sole. Made for professional men who love their formal wear and want to look sharp and crisp, this shoe is lighter than traditional running shoes, coming with great shock absorbers that allow you to run from one meeting to another without feeling any stress or fear of slips and sprains. Replete with a smooth, flawless upper and a plain toe silhouette, it's a great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Perforations in a definite design for improved ventilation and style Nappa leather lining for moisture absorption and abrasion resistance Plain toe design for a neater, crisper look and extra durability Strobel construction for added stability and forefoot flexibility Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Mesh inner for ample breathability Lightly padded tongue with perforations for better ventilation Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Brand badge on lateral heel Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Moisture-absorbent and odour-resistant ortholite footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Horizontal grooves throughout for better grip Rectangular grooves on the lateral heel, midfoot and medial forefoot for imrpoved grip and traction on various surfaces Horse shoe pattern with scooped heel for enhanced cushioing Flex grooves in the forefoot for easy movement Raised heel for a stylish look Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlightUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine
